org_constraint: Include the phrase "a cataclysmic event" in the third sentence.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "cataclysmic" in the article.

Many researchers point to a massive asteroid impact as the primary cause of this global disaster. This collision would have sent debris into the atmosphere, blocking sunlight and cooling the planet. Volcanic activity in the Deccan Traps may have also contributed to the environmental stress. Ultimately, the combination of these factors created an inhospitable world for large reptiles.

For millions of years, dinosaurs ruled the Earth with unmatched power and diversity. Scientists have long debated the reasons behind their sudden disappearance from the fossil record. It is now widely accepted that a cataclysmic event triggered the mass extinction that ended their reign. Many researchers point to a massive asteroid impact as the primary cause of this global disaster. This collision would have sent debris into the atmosphere, blocking sunlight and cooling the planet. Volcanic activity in the Deccan Traps may have also contributed to the environmental stress. Ultimately, the combination of these factors created an inhospitable world for large reptiles.
